device: Defines the computation device used by the pipeline, such as 'cuda' for GPU execution or 'cpu' for CPU execution.
image_dir: Directory containing the input images to be processed by the pipeline.
output_dir: Directory where all outputs generated by the pipeline will be saved, including cached artifacts, plots, intermediate files, and final results.
generate_plots: Enables or disables the generation of diagnostic and visualization plots across the pipeline.
run_dino_pipeline: Enables or disables execution of the semantic branch based on DINOv2 features.
run_resnet_pipeline: Enables or disables execution of the structural branch based on ResNet features.
run_fusion_pipeline: Enables or disables execution of the fusion branch that combines DINOv2 and ResNet features.
extractors_resnet_model_name: Name of the ResNet model used for structural feature extraction.
extractors_resnet_layer_name: Name or dotted path of the intermediate ResNet layer from which feature maps are extracted.
extractors_dino_v2_model_name: Name of the DINOv2 model used for semantic feature extraction.
extractors_dino_v2_layer_name: Name or dotted path of the intermediate DINOv2 layer from which feature representations are extracted.
extractors_clip_model_name: Name of the CLIP model used for region-level semantic labeling.
extractors_clip_layer_name: Name or dotted path of the CLIP visual layer hooked to extract patch-level image features.
heuristic_settings_sam_model: Identifier of the SAM2 model checkpoint used to generate region proposals for heuristic k estimation.
heuristic_settings_generator_params_poin: Number of sampling points per image side used by the SAM automatic mask generator.
heuristic_settings_generator_params_pred: Predicted IoU threshold used by SAM to retain candidate masks.
heuristic_settings_generator_params_stab: Stability-score threshold used by SAM to filter unstable masks.
heuristic_settings_generator_params_min_: Minimum region area required for a generated SAM mask to be retained.
heuristic_settings_filter_params_filter_: Minimum mask area as a fraction of the image area required for a SAM proposal to be kept after filtering.
heuristic_settings_filter_params_use_nms: Enables or disables non-maximum suppression over generated SAM masks before heuristic k estimation.
heuristic_settings_filter_params_nms_iou: IoU threshold used in non-maximum suppression when removing redundant SAM masks.
heuristic_settings_k_heuristic_formulas_: Base value used in the heuristic formula that estimates the semantic number of clusters.
Scale factor controlling how strongly the number of filtered SAM regions affects the semantic k estimate.
Multiplier applied to the semantic estimate to derive the structural k estimate.
Maximum allowed number of clusters returned by the heuristic estimator.
labeler_words_json_path: Path to the JSON file containing the candidate vocabulary used by the CLIP labeler.
labeler_prompt_template: List of text templates used to generate CLIP prompts for candidate labels.
labeler_aggregation_method: Strategy used to aggregate pooled CLIP region features before comparing them with text embeddings.
labeler_aggregation_top_k_perc: Top fraction of feature responses retained when using a top-k-based CLIP feature aggregation strategy.
labeler_top_n_labels: Maximum number of candidate labels returned for each labeled region or cluster.
labeler_clip_confidence_mode: Method used to transform CLIP similarity scores into a confidence estimate for label assignment.
labeler_clip_margin_temperature: Temperature parameter used when margin-based CLIP confidence scaling is enabled.
labeler_clip_min_margin: Minimum score margin required for a CLIP label prediction to be considered confident.
labeler_context_crop_enabled: Enables or disables contextual cropping around a candidate region before CLIP feature pooling.
labeler_context_crop_mode: Strategy used to define how the contextual crop is computed around the region of interest.
labeler_context_crop_scale: Scale factor used to expand the contextual crop around a candidate region.
validator_settings_semantic_threshold: Minimum semantic-consistency score required for a candidate mask to pass validation.
validator_settings_structural_threshold: Minimum structural-consistency score required for a candidate mask to pass validation.
validator_settings_final_threshold: Minimum final weighted validation score required for a candidate mask to be accepted.
validator_settings_weights_clip_confiden: Weight assigned to CLIP semantic confidence when computing the final validation score.
validator_settings_weights_dino_iou: Weight assigned to the DINO-based IoU match when computing the final validation score.
validator_settings_weights_resnet_iou: Weight assigned to the ResNet-based IoU match when computing the final validation score.
postprocess_identity_resolver_enabled: Enables or disables the post-processing stage that refines validated masks by ranking, penalization, and suppression.
postprocess_identity_resolver_top_k: Maximum number of validated masks retained after identity resolution.
postprocess_identity_resolver_use_global: Enables or disables an additional global non-maximum suppression step across all retained masks.
postprocess_identity_resolver_nms_iou_th: IoU threshold used for global non-maximum suppression during post-processing.
IoU threshold used to suppress overlapping masks that share the same semantic label.
postprocess_identity_resolver_max_area_f: Maximum allowed fraction of image area for a validated mask before it is penalized or filtered.
postprocess_identity_resolver_border_tou: Threshold indicating how much a mask may touch the image borders before receiving a penalty.
postprocess_identity_resolver_strip_aspe: Aspect-ratio threshold used to classify a mask as strip-like or overly elongated.
postprocess_identity_resolver_strip_area: Maximum image-area fraction tolerated for strip-like masks before they are penalized or removed.
postprocess_identity_resolver_area_penal: Penalty applied to very large masks during identity resolution.
postprocess_identity_resolver_border_pen: Penalty applied to masks that excessively touch the image border.
postprocess_identity_resolver_strip_pena: Penalty applied to strip-like or elongated masks during post-processing.
plotting_settings_generate_per_image_plo: Controls whether plots are generated separately for each processed image.
plotting_settings_max_images_to_plot: Maximum number of images for which plots will be generated.
resnet_pipeline_image_preprocessing_use_: Enables or disables CLAHE contrast enhancement before ResNet feature extraction.
Enables or disables Gaussian blur before ResNet feature extraction.
Enables or disables grayscale conversion before ResNet feature extraction.
resnet_pipeline_clustering_clusterer_met: Clustering algorithm used in the ResNet structural branch.
resnet_pipeline_clustering_clusterer_n_n: Number of neighbors used when building the affinity graph for graph-based clustering in the ResNet branch.
resnet_pipeline_clustering_feature_proce: Enables or disables normalization of ResNet feature vectors before clustering.
Enables or disables dimensionality reduction of ResNet feature vectors before clustering.
Normalization method applied to ResNet feature vectors before clustering.
Dimensionality-reduction method applied to ResNet feature vectors before clustering, when enabled.
Target number of components retained by the dimensionality-reduction step in the ResNet branch.
resnet_pipeline_clustering_k_selection_m: Method used to determine the number of clusters in the ResNet branch, such as 'silhouette' or another supported strategy.
resnet_pipeline_clustering_k_selection_k: Range of candidate k values evaluated when the ResNet branch uses silhouette-based cluster selection.
resnet_pipeline_clustering_run_clip_labe: Enables or disables CLIP-based semantic labeling of clusters generated by the ResNet branch.
dino_pipeline_clustering_clusterer_metho: Clustering algorithm used in the DINOv2 semantic branch.
dino_pipeline_clustering_clusterer_n_nei: Number of neighbors used when building the affinity graph for graph-based clustering in the DINOv2 branch.
dino_pipeline_clustering_feature_process: Enables or disables normalization of DINOv2 feature vectors before clustering.
Enables or disables dimensionality reduction of DINOv2 feature vectors before clustering.
Normalization method applied to DINOv2 feature vectors before clustering.
Dimensionality-reduction method applied to DINOv2 feature vectors before clustering, when enabled.
Target number of components retained by the dimensionality-reduction step in the DINOv2 branch.
dino_pipeline_clustering_k_selection_met: Method used to determine the number of clusters in the DINOv2 branch, such as 'silhouette' or another supported strategy.
dino_pipeline_clustering_k_selection_k_r: Range of candidate k values evaluated when the DINOv2 branch uses silhouette-based cluster selection.
dino_pipeline_clustering_run_clip_labeli: Enables or disables CLIP-based semantic labeling of clusters generated by the DINOv2 branch.
fusion_pipeline_clustering_clusterer_met: Clustering algorithm used in the fusion branch over concatenated DINOv2 and ResNet features.
fusion_pipeline_clustering_clusterer_n_n: Number of neighbors used when building the affinity graph for graph-based clustering in the fusion branch.
fusion_pipeline_clustering_feature_proce: Enables or disables normalization of fused feature vectors before clustering.
Enables or disables dimensionality reduction of fused feature vectors before clustering.
Normalization method applied to fused feature vectors before clustering.
Dimensionality-reduction method applied to fused feature vectors before clustering, when enabled.
Target number of components retained by the dimensionality-reduction step in the fusion branch.
fusion_pipeline_clustering_k_selection_m: Method used to determine the number of clusters in the fusion branch.
fusion_pipeline_clustering_k_selection_k: Range of candidate k values evaluated when the fusion branch uses search-based cluster selection.
Specifies which branch provides the reference k value for the fusion pipeline when inherited or heuristic k selection is used.
fusion_pipeline_clustering_run_clip_labe: Enables or disables CLIP-based semantic labeling of clusters generated by the fusion branch.
